User.title: User
User.description: Stores user profile and balance information.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

photoURL.description: The profile photo URL of the user.

balance.description: The current balance of the user in INR.

referralCode.description: The unique referral code for this user.

referredBy.description: The referral code of the user who referred this user.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user was created.

Task.title: Task
Task.description: Defines a task that a user can complete to earn rewards.

id.description: The unique ID of the task.

description.description: A brief description of the task.

Withdrawal.title: Withdrawal
Withdrawal.description: Stores a withdrawal request from a user.

id.description: The unique ID of the withdrawal request.

uid.description: The ID of the user requesting the withdrawal.

amount.description: The amount requested to be withdrawn.

status.description: The status of the withdrawal request.

paymentMethod.description: The payment method (e.g., UPI, Bank Transfer).

paymentDetails.description: The details for the payment method (e.g., UPI ID).

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the request was made.

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Stores a history of earnings and withdrawals for a user.

id.description: The unique ID of the transaction.

amount.description: The transaction amount (positive for earnings, negative for withdrawals).

description.description: A brief description of the transaction.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the transaction occurred.
